title: Connecting "My Contact" board and then to automate through multiple boards

posts.author: NeilB101 (Neil )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone,

New to the Forum but been playing with Monday for a bit, hope you’re all well.

Surly this should be a thing! I’ve got some great guys at Monday helping with this but I’m struggling to understand why this isn’t already a thing.

I’ll try and be brief

Signage Company

BOARDS
Lead
Project - Multiple Boards - Vehicle Wrap - Signage - Print
Procurement
Production
Install
Handover
Accounting
Complete Job.

That’s the short of it. All I need is to Connect “My CRM” with a Column "Client " and a Mirror Board with a column “Company” and for these boards to run through the full system, all boards have automation. But this isn’t supported which is painful, If someone could guide me either on a work around or another option, I’m all ears. FYI I have another system in Monday and it this works?? Monday can’t tell me why but I need this to work on this board.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m struggling to understand your question. Can you give some more details?

posts.author: NeilB101 (Neil )
posts.cookedHtml:
Good afternoon Desiree,

Lets say we have 3 boards. Board 1. called NEW LEADS, Board 2 QUALIFIED LEADS and a 3rd board called MY CONTACTS which is a list of clients.

When I move an item between boards 1 and 2 with an automation the connected board (3) information is lost. The item column is there but empty. That’s the basic principal of the issue.

Hope that helps! Thanks in advance for your time

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @NeilB101

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column, here’s how it can be used in this case →
